NIGHTMOON-NUN_STRIKE.title: Strike
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEFEND.title: Defend
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION.title: Confession
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ATTACK_PRAYER.title: Attack Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ATTACK_PRAYER.description: Prayer 1-4: Deal {Damage}+ damage. Higher tier = more damage, longer wait.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PEEK_FUTURE.title: Peek Future
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PEEK_FUTURE.description: Draw 1 card. NL Advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PIETY.title: Piety
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PIETY.description: Gain {Block} Block. NL Advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRACTICE.title: Practice
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAISE.title: Praise
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAISE.description: Exhaust. NL Advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RETREAT_PRAYER.title: Retreat Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_STRIKE.title: Holy Strike
NIGHTMOON-NUN_GAZE.title: Gaze
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SILENT_PRAYER.title: Silent Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SILENT_PRAYER.description: Gain {Block} Block. NL If you have a Prayer waiting, draw 1 card.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SKYFIRE_PRAYER.title: Skyfire Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SKYFIRE_PRAYER.description: Prayer 1: Deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANGRY_PRAYER.title: Angry Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_PRAYER.title: Doom Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ASSASSINATE.title: Assassinate
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ROCKFALL.title: Rockfall
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ROCKFALL.description: Deal {Damage} plus the current combat round as damage.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_THORN_STRIKE.title: Thorn Strike
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_RECORD.title: Confession Record
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_RECORD.descript: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain {NunConfessionRecordPower} Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_SHIELD.title: Holy Shield
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RESONANCE.title: Resonance
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MAGIC.title: Magic
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MAGIC.description: Draw 2 cards. NL Advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_PRAYER.title: Mana Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SWIFT_PRAYER.title: Swift Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_HAUNT.title: Doom Haunt
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_PRAYER.title: Life Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_WEAK_RAY.title: Weak Ray
NIGHTMOON-NUN_WEAK_RAY.description: Deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies. NL Apply {Weak} Weak to ALL enemies.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DAWN.title: Dawn
NIGHTMOON-NUN_BLADE_SHIELD.title: Blade and Shield
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_DRAIN.title: Life Drain
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_DRAIN.description: Exhaust. NL Deal {Damage} damage. NL Heal {Damage} HP.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SACRED_STRIKE.title: Sacred Strike
NIGHTMOON-NUN_JUDGEMENT.title: Judgement
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FORWARD_RETREAT.title: Forward Retreat
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FORWARD_RETREAT.descriptio: Deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies. NL Draw 1 card for each Prayer waiting.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_POSSESSED.title: Possessed
NIGHTMOON-NUN_BOMB.title: Bomb
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBUKE.title: Rebuke
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBUKE.description: Deal damage equal to the number of Prayer cards in your deck.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_PURIFICATION.title: Holy Purification
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_PURIFICATION.descript: Deal {Damage} damage. NL If target is below 30% HP, deal double damage.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LINKED_CASTING.title: Linked Casting
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LINKED_CASTING.description: The next {NunLinkedCastingPower} times you play a Skill, draw 1 card.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_NATURE_MARK.title: Nature Mark
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_CHARM.title: Life Charm
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_IMAGE.title: Holy Image
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_IMAGE.description: Whenever your Prayers advance, gain {NunHolyImagePower} Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PROTECTION.title: Divine Protection
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PROTECTION.descript: Exhaust. NL Gain {Buffer} Buffer. NL Advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RETALIATION.title: Retaliation
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RETALIATION.description: Exhaust. NL Deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_CALAMITY.title: Doom Calamity
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_CALAMITY.description: At the end of your turn, advance your current Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ENCIRCLING.title: Encircling
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ENCIRCLING.description: At the end of your turn, gain {NunEncirclingPower} Block for each Prayer waiting.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER.title: Shield Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER.description: Prayer 1: At the start of your next turn, gain 7 Block.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANGEL_SHIELD.title: Angel Shield
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANGEL_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block} Block. NL Shuffle a copy of this card into your draw pile.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_TWISTED_FUTURE.title: Twisted Future
NIGHTMOON-NUN_TWISTED_FUTURE.description: Deal {Damage} damage. NL If Confession is greater than 5, deal 4 additional damage.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REPENT_PRAYER.title: Repent Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REDEMPTION.title: Redemption
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REDEMPTION.description: Exhaust. NL Target loses HP equal to your Confession. NL Halve your Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_STUDY.title: Study
NIGHTMOON-NUN_STUDY.description: Draw 1 card. NL Deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies. NL If all cards in hand have different types, repeat both effects.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SACRIFICE.title: Sacrifice
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SACRIFICE.description: Deal {Damage} damage. NL If this kills the enemy, gain 1 Energy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MOURNING.title: Mourning
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MIRROR.title: Mirror
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MIRROR.description: Create a copy of the leftmost card in your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_ROBE.title: Confession Robe
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_ROBE.descriptio: Exhaust. NL Gain Block equal to your Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PENANCE.title: Penance
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ABYSS.title: Abyss
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HAND_OF_GOD.title: Hand of God
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HAND_OF_GOD.description: Exhaust. NL Target loses half its current HP (max 60).
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SETTLEMENT_TIME.title: Settlement Time
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SETTLEMENT_TIME.descriptio: Exhaust. NL Deal 50% of damage dealt last turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SPIRIT_STORM.title: Spirit Storm
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SPIRIT_STORM.description: Exhaust. NL Deal {Damage} damage. NL Stun enemies below 50% HP.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_WATER_BATH.title: Holy Water Bath
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_WATER_BATH.descriptio: Remove all Curses from your deck.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_INSPIRATION_BURST.title: Inspiration Burst
NIGHTMOON-NUN_INSPIRATION_BURST.descript: Gain {Block} Block. NL Choose 1 of 3 random Skill cards from your draw pile and put it into your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PROPHECY.title: Prophecy
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PROPHECY.description: Look at the top 3 cards of your draw pile. Choose 2 to put into your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PROPHECY.selectionScreenPr: Choose cards to put into your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MEMORY.title: Memory
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MEMORY.description: Choose 1 card from your exhaust pile. Add a copy to your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CRYSTAL_BALL.title: Crystal Ball
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CRYSTAL_BALL.description: Autoplay the top card of your draw pile.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DREAM.title: Dream
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DREAM.description: Add a random Prayer card to your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_SURGE.title: Mana Surge
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_SURGE.description: Ethereal. NL At the start of each turn, gain 1 Energy. NL Your Prayer cards take {NunManaSurgePower} additional turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHORTCUT.title: Shortcut
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHORTCUT.description: The next {NunShortcutPower} Prayer cards you play take 1 fewer turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FOG.title: Fog
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FOG.description: Exhaust. NL The next {NunFogPower} times you lose HP, lose half as much.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEMON_BLADE.title: Demon Blade
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEMON_BLADE.description: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to your total floor divided by 5 to a random enemy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_AREA.title: Holy Area
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_AREA.description: Whenever a Prayer resolves, gain {NunHolyAreaPower} Block.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBIRTH_PRAYER.title: Rebirth Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBIRTH_PRAYER.description: Prayer 2: Add 3 random Prayer cards to your Prayer zone.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEVOUR_PRAYER.title: Devour Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_SCEPTER.title: Divine Scepter
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_SCEPTER.description: Exhaust. NL Add copies of all Prayer cards in your deck to your Prayer zone at maximum Prayer tier.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PUNISHMENT.title: Divine Punishment
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PUNISHMENT.descript: Exhaust. NL Prayer 4: Choose an Attack card from your deck and autoplay it 4 times.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PUNISHMENT.selectio: Choose an Attack card to autoplay.
